title: Pre-flight: crypto funding/basis carry (delta-neutral) net Sharpe
source: Alpha-avenue review 2026-05-29 (quant-phd-advisor, literature-grounded). Directional prediction exhausted (9 nulls); non-directional risk premia untested. See agent review for citations.
why: The single most promising NON-directional, durable, orthogonal-to-our-9-nulls premium for our universe (advisor: net Sharpe 0.5-1.7 venue-dependent; accrues every 8h). Cheap to falsify before any build.
scope: Pull >=1y funding-rate + basis history for BTC/ETH/SOL (perps).
Compute delta-neutral (spot long + perp short) carry Sharpe NET of fees + funding-flip + a realistic deleveraging-event assumption.
GATE: requires perpetual instruments. CONFIRM whether the Syphonix competition venue exposes perps (we only have spot listed). If spot-only, this collapses to weak FX-carry-grade -> deprioritize.
If net Sharpe clears ~0.7 -> promote to a spec. 1-day spike, not a pipeline rebuild.

history.reason: backlog: log non-directional alpha avenues (B0100-B0102) from PhD review

Pre-flight DONE + Syphonix research DONE. (1) Premium is REAL on a perp exchange: Binance BTC/ETH funding ~3%/yr, 76% of intervals positive. BUT the headline Sharpe (8-22) is the CLASSIC CARRY ILLUSION: tiny unlevered return (~2-3.5%/yr) with SEVERE negative skew (basket -4.9, SOL -9.7, SOL net carry NEGATIVE) -> pennies in front of a steamroller; realistic levered net Sharpe is far lower (lit: 0.5-1.7). (2) BLOCKER: Syphonix is ~85-90% a CFD/spot venue (FIX4.4->MT5/OneZero, BTCUSD-style naming, no funding mention) => NO exchange funding rate => delta-neutral funding carry NOT deployable on the competition platform. CFD overnight swap is broker-set (usually negative both sides), not a harvestable long-pays-short funding. Resolving fact when creds arrive: grep the instrument schema for a funding_rate field. Only viable as a POST-hackathon product on a real perp exchange (Binance/Bybit), outside the competition.
research(alpha): two pre-flights + Syphonix perp-access verdict
